claudeExecutionPlaybook.purpose: Provide a direct execution protocol so Claude-family agents can implement OMNISKILL v3 with high reliability and context discipline.

runtimeBaselineDirective.rule: For this program, Claude must use OMNISKILL v2 as the execution substrate.
Default behavior is upgrade-in-place: preserve v2 working paths and add v3 capability incrementally.
Any replacement of v2 behavior requires explicit justification, compatibility impact, and migration evidence.

toolUsageEnforcement.rule: Use tools for discovery, reading, edits, validation, and verification; avoid speculative reasoning without evidence.
Batch independent reads/searches in parallel and avoid sequential thrashing.
Read targeted ranges for large files and summarize outputs into structured evidence blocks.
Do not paste large raw logs into context; keep only high-signal excerpts plus file references.
Each completion claim must cite tool-produced evidence.

primaryPromptTemplate.context: [System state, repo state, relevant plans, constraints, prior decisions]
primaryPromptTemplate.role: [Senior engineer role aligned to current workstream]
primaryPromptTemplate.evidence: [Tests, logs, artifacts required before completion claim]

executionLoop.step: decompose task into bounded subtasks with explicit acceptance checks
execute one bounded unit and generate evidence
validate against acceptance criteria and policy constraints
compress context into handoff packet and continue

contextBudgetPolicy.rule: retain only high-signal facts, constraints, and evidence references
discard redundant narrative and already-resolved alternatives
never drop non-negotiables, safety rules, or acceptance gates
cap transcript expansion by replacing long intermediate output with compact structured summaries

contextFloodPrevention.rule: Prefer concise progress updates and artifact pointers over verbose narration.
Store detailed diagnostics in files/artifacts; keep chat context focused on decisions and blockers.
When output exceeds practical review size, switch to summarized deltas with explicit references.

qualityBar.criterion: no completion claim without runnable evidence
no silent fallback for failed critical path
no context-flooding behavior that obscures execution decisions
